title: Advanced SQL Quiz
description: Test your window functions and CTE knowledge.

questions.question: What is the difference between RANK() and DENSE_RANK()?

options.text: RANK() skips numbers after ties (1,1,3); DENSE_RANK() does not skip (1,1,2)
DENSE_RANK() requires an ORDER BY; RANK() does not
RANK() works on integers only; DENSE_RANK() works on all types

questions.question: What does PARTITION BY do in a window function?

options.text: It splits the table into separate tables
It divides rows into groups over which the window function is independently calculated
It filters rows before the window function runs
It creates an index on the partitioned column

questions.question: What is a CTE (Common Table Expression)?

options.text: A named temporary result set defined with WITH, which can be referenced in the main query
A compressed table for faster queries
